arts.ttl: Ajax captain Jordan Henderson not recovered in time for weather-hit Europa League meeting with Union Saint-Gilloise
arts.sum: Injury and weather updates ahead of Ajax's trip to Brussels to face Union Saint-Gilloise in their Europa League playoff (De Telegraaf).

Union St.Gilloise come into Thursday's welcome of Ajax in good form. Indeed, the Belgian side have won six of their last seven, and are unbeaten in 10 at home, winning eight times in that run. Ajax, ...
